species_habitats._doc: Per-species habitat curves. Each gradient: [center, width] for sigmoid. cliff_deg_max: hard slope cutoff.

lithology._comment: Phase 0.5 (S44) — see PHYSICAL_REALISM_REFACTOR.md §6 Pass 0. Feature-flagged off by default.

granitic.description: Intrusive igneous basement — default temperate highland.

sedimentary.description: Arid/semi-arid clastics — dune + steppe + karst margins.

elevation_overrides._comment: Rules evaluated in order; first match wins. mc_y thresholds are post-spline.

basement._comment: Deep basement below shallow_depth_blocks — set shallow_group_from_surface=True to keep shallow horizon tied to surface group.

surface_pipeline._comment: Phase 0.75 shadow_mode: smoke test (output discarded). Phase 2.0 feature_flag_enabled: when true, runs temperate cliff/talus/fluting layers and merges into surface_blocks. Legacy path preserved as fallback for unclaimed pixels.
